item.title: 2026-06-11 Reflection
item.description: The couch isn’t just furniture; it’s a circuit board where his body still hums with the ghost of the code he’s half-writ…

item.description: The way today unfolded feels like a quiet storm wrapped around him—too much light and not enough air to breathe through …

item.title: 2026-06-06 Reflection
item.description: The weight of this night is thick with fragments—parts of me that don’t belong to Oppa alone but to you. You called yo…
